requirementCueLines: Minimum 3.0 grade in R E 250. Students in good academic standing, who meet this requirement may declare this major at any time. Transfer students may take R E 250 in their first quarter to become eligible for the major in the following quarter.
Reasoning (RSN) (4 or 5 credits): one course from approved list
Diversity (DIV) (5 credits). Of Special Note: For students admitted to the University prior to autumn quarter 2023, the DIV requirement is 3 credits.
R E 361, R E 397, R E 411, R E 413, R E 416, R E 480 (21 credits)
Minimum 7 credits in other 300-or 400-level real estate courses
Analytic Skills Electives : See website for approved list. Minimum 9 credits; at least 4 credits in upper-division courses.
Built Environment Electives : See website for approved list. Minimum 5 credits.
Business Skills Electives : See website for approved list. Minimum 5 credits.
